title: Sindhu Nadhiyin Isai Lyrics Kai Koduttha Dheivam
stanzas:
<div>
Sindhu Nadhiyin Isai Lyrics Kai Koduttha Dheivam

Sindhu nadhiyin isai nilavinilae
sera nannaatilam pengaludane.
sundra thelunginil paatisaithu
tholigal oati vilaiyaadi varuvom (2)

gangai nadhi purathu
godhumai pandam (2)
kaaviri vetrilaikku
maaru kolvom.

singa maraatiyar tham
kavithai kondu.
serathu thanthangal
parisalippom. (2)

Sindhu nadhiyin isai nilavinilae
sera nannaatilam pengaludane.
sundra thelunginil paatisaithu
tholigal oati vilaiyaadi varuvom

singala theevinik or
paalam amaippom.
saethuvai maeduruthi
veedhi samaippom (2)

vangathil oadi varum
neerin migaiyaal.
maiyaththu nadigalil
payir seiyyuvom.

Sindhu nadhiyin isai nilavinilae
sera nannaatilam pengaludane.
sundra thelunginil paatisaithu
tholigal oati vilaiyaadi varuvom

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Sindhu Nadhiyin Isai conveys themes of nature and devotion, celebrating the beauty of rivers and their significance in life.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In the movie Kai Koduttha Dheivam, the song reflects the characters' emotional connection to their surroundings and their spiritual journey.

Who are the singers and music director?

The song features the legendary voices of L.R. Eeswari and T.M. Soundararajan, with music composed by Viswanathan–Ramamoorthy.

When was the song released?

Sindhu Nadhiyin Isai was released on July 18, 1970.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Sindhu Nadhiyin Isai from Kai Koduttha Dheivam beautifully encapsulates the serene connection between nature and spirituality. It evokes a sense of nostalgia and devotion, inviting listeners to reflect on the beauty of life and the rivers that flow through it. The harmonious blend of L.R. Eeswari's and T.M. Soundararajan's voices creates an enchanting atmosphere, making it a cherished classic. This melody resonates deeply, stirring emotions and memories associated with the past.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sindhu Nadhiyin Isai from the Kai Koduttha Dheivam is a timeless melody that resonates with the soul. This enchanting song, featuring the mesmerizing voices of L.R. Eeswari and T.M. Soundararajan, captures the essence of devotion and nostalgia. Experience the magic of classic Tamil music that transcends generations and evokes deep emotions.
stanzaMeanings: Sindhu Nadhiyin Isai Lyrics Kai Koduttha Dheivam
The music of the river joins with the moonlight, and in this beautiful land, the girls will come. In the beautiful light, we will sing and play, and the games will come to us.
The Ganges river brings a harvest of wheat. We will change to the success of the Kaveri river.
The poets of the lion clan bring their poetry. We will unite and celebrate together.
Sindhu Nadhiyin Isai Lyrics Kai Koduttha Dheivam
We will build a bridge to the ocean. We will create a path for the gathering streets.
With the excess of water that flows in the streams, we will cultivate the fields in the land.
Sindhu Nadhiyin Isai Lyrics Kai Koduttha Dheivam
